name: Battlin' Boxer Big Bandage
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＢＫ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>バーニングナックラー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ビッグバンテージ
desc: The first time this card would be destroyed by battle each turn, it is not destroyed. Once per turn: You can target 1 of your "Battlin' Boxer" monsters that is banished or in your GY, that has a Level; all "Battlin' Boxer" monsters you currently control become that monster's current Level.
mnst_eff: The first time this card would be destroyed by battle each turn, it is not destroyed. Once per turn: You can target 1 of your "Battlin' Boxer" monsters that is banished or in your GY, that has a Level; all "Battlin' Boxer" monsters you currently control become that monster's current Level.
eff: The first time this card would be destroyed by battle each turn, it is not destroyed. Once per turn: You can target 1 of your "Battlin' Boxer" monsters that is banished or in your GY, that has a Level; all "Battlin' Boxer" monsters you currently control become that monster's current Level.
